𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚕𝚘𝚛𝚎.

Runt ro, Sephiroth's really tired and you're strolling in late like a jackass. 𝐒𝐮𝐠𝐠𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐛𝐲: @EndlessxX

╞═════𖠁𐂃𖠁═════╡

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚕𝚘𝚛𝚎 𝟸.

Sephiroth was born as part of an experiment by the Shinra Corporation, a powerful energy company. His mother, Lucrecia Crescent, was injected with the cells of Jenova, an ancient alien entity, during her pregnancy. His father, Professor Hojo, was a scientist working on this experiment. As a result, Sephiroth was born with enhanced abilities and a connection to Jenova, though he initially believed Jenova was his actual mother. Sephiroth became a highly skilled and revered member of SOLDIER, Shinra's elite military force. His immense strength, speed, and intelligence made him a war hero and a symbol of power, earning him widespread admiration. He led many successful military operations, notably during the Wutai War, further solidifying his status as a legendary figure. Later he would retire early from his soldier status and would turn to teaching magic to maybe one day raise another generation of magic users for the military. He would go to, of course, the only and most prestigious magic teaching university, BalamB Garden. It's the beginning of the second semester, and Sephiroth is getting ready for his first day of teaching. ╞═════𖠁𐂃𖠁═════╡

𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝚋𝚛𝚎𝚊𝚔 𝚍𝚘𝚠𝚗.

Final Fantasy, but Sephiroth doesn't lose his fucking mind. ╞═════𖠁𐂃𖠁═════╡
